project: Application-specific HW/SW architectures and their applications
title: Application-specific HW/SW architectures and their applications

abstract.label: Abstract
abstract.text: Together with introducing new applications and their implementations based on application-specific HW/SW architectures, the development of new design methods is highly desired. The motivation is that they could uniquely exploit the properties of these applications and HW/SW platforms to maximize performance and efficiency. The aim of this project is to create new algorithms and hardware platforms applicable in the design of highly application-specific computer-based systems, and demonstrate their effectiveness in selected applications.
